title: _windows.jsonl — enumeration window state
description: One record per enumeration window attempt (commoner-probe sansad --all). Append-only; the latest record per window_id wins. A window is skipped on resume only when its latest status is "complete" and its scope (qtype, and for RS the date bounds) matches the current run.

from_date.description: ISO date window lower bound (LS: always set; RS: run-level filter if any)

qtype.description: qtype filter active for this window's run; null = both

kept.description: Records written to manifest by this window attempt

errors.description: Errors recorded during this window attempt
